executives.name: Jeanna Steele
executives.background: Jeanna Steele has served as our Chief Legal Officer and Chief Compliance Officer since May 2022. She previously served as our General Counsel from 2018 to 2022 and as Deputy General Counsel from 2015 to 2018. Prior to Sunrun, she was an attorney at Wilson Sonsini Goodrich & Rosati.

executives.name: Paul Dickson
executives.background: Paul Dickson has served as our Chief Revenue Officer since May 2022. He previously served as our President, Sunrun Direct from 2020 to 2022 and as Senior Vice President, Operations from 2018 to 2020. Mr. Dickson joined Sunrun through the acquisition of Vivint Solar, where he served as Chief Revenue Officer.

tenure_dates.title: Chief Revenue Officer / Chief Sales Officer / Founding Management Team
